data.title: Strategy's new website discloses a variety of business data, setting a standard for transparency in corporate finance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cointelegraph published an article on the X platform saying that Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy)’s new official website discloses a number of business data and sets transparency standards for corporate finances.

data.title: Bitcoin self-custody app Relai says it plans to change its name to Relai ₿
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin self-hosted application Relai posted on the X platform that in order to reflect its commitment to Bitcoin, it plans to change its name to Relai ₿. Same application. Same mission. Now there is one more ₿.
Earlier news, MicroStrategy changed its name to Strategy, and its company logo has a Bitcoin symbol ₿.

data.title: ECB official: Should be ready to cut interest rates below neutral level
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Eurozone rate setters urged economists to stop looking at the so-called neutral rate, warning that the indicator is "not a good guide" to the trend of borrowing costs in a region increasingly affected by weak growth and global uncertainty. The European Central Bank's chief economist Lane said the European Central Bank should be ready to lower borrowing costs below the neutral level to boost economic growth. He said: "We should not limit our freedom of action because of a theoretical concept," adding that the ECB should keep an "open mind" about the final level of interest rates. (Jinshi)

data.title: CZ: The number of opBNB active addresses reached a peak last week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance co-founder CZ posted on the X platform that the number of active addresses of opBNB reached its highest level last week.

data.title: Ethereum Struggles Against Rising Blockchain Rivals, JPMorgan Analysts Report
data.description: According to The Block: Ethereum, once the unchallenged leader in smart contracts and decentralized applications, is experiencing significant market challenges, as detailed in a recent JPMorgan report. The analysis, led by Managing Director Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou, highlights Ethereum’s diminishing share in the crypto market, which has fallen to its lowest in four years amidst the U.S. election-induced crypto market rally.The report attributes Ethereum's underperformance primarily to escalating competition from newer blockchains like Solana and various Layer 2 solutions that offer lower transaction fees and improved scalability. Despite Ethereum's recent Dencun upgrade, which aimed to lower costs and enhance network capacity, there has been a notable shift in activity from Ethereum’s mainnet to these Layer 2 platforms, further straining the original network.Further exacerbating Ethereum's challenges are strategic moves by major decentralized applications. Platforms such as Uniswap, dYdX, and Hyperliquid are transitioning to their own chains, seeking better operational efficiency and cost-effectiveness. The anticipated migration of Uniswap to its Unichain is particularly significant, as it threatens to reduce Ethereum's transaction fee revenues, potentially leading to an inflationary trend due to decreased token burns.Despite these hurdles, Ethereum continues to hold a strong position in areas like stablecoin issuance, decentralized finance (DeFi), and tokenization. However, its ability to maintain this dominance is uncertain. In response to these challenges, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin and the Ethereum Foundation have invested in Etherealize, a startup aimed at boosting Ethereum's adoption among financial institutions by showcasing its tokenization capabilities and simplifying integration processes.While Ethereum remains a pivotal force in the blockchain sector, JPMorgan analysts caution that it will likely continue to face intense competition from emerging networks, potentially impacting its market prominence and appeal to institutional investors.

data.title: Derivatives Protocol Polynomial Announces Joining Optimism Retro Funding Program
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Derivatives protocol Polynomial Protocol announced that it has joined the Optimism Retro Funding program. Ethereum's second-layer network solution Optimism has announced the launch of a new round of Retro Funding. The scale of this fund is 8 million OPs, which is only to provide support for the builders behind the on-chain application development tools.

data.title: Blockchain supply chain solution Autify Network receives strategic investment from Ava Labs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Autify Network, a blockchain supply chain solution headquartered in Singapore and Bangalore, announced that Avalanche blockchain development company Ava Labs has received strategic investment. The specific funds have not been disclosed. The new funds are intended to support its use of blockchain and artificial intelligence (AI) to improve transparency, trust and efficiency, and will use Avalanche infrastructure to build a decentralized supply chain ecosystem. (newzchain)

data.title: CZ: There are always people who question whether Bitcoin is a means of storing value. Value storage means long-term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to David Sacks, the White House's director of encryption and AI, saying that Bitcoin is an excellent means of storing value, Binance co-founder CZ posted on the X platform, "Why do people always question whether Bitcoin is a good means of storing value?" In response to the community's response to the sharp drop in Bitcoin, CZ added: "Value storage means long-term."

data.title: CITIC Securities: The IDC industry continues to be booming. With the rise of cryptocurrency, AI has become the main driver of the industry
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to a research report by CITIC Securities, the IDC (Internet Data Center) industry continues to be highly prosperous. With the recovery of traditional corporate IT spending and the surge in cryptocurrency, AI has become the main driver of the industry. The pace of expansion of US IDC companies has accelerated, and growth expectations have been raised. The Federal Reserve's entry into the interest rate cut channel will also bring more positive catalysts: from the performance dimension, interest rate cuts are expected to reduce corporate financing costs and release profits; from the valuation dimension, downward interest rates may increase the overall valuation level of the industry; from the industry dimension, AI drives the threshold to rise, and IDC manufacturers that undertake head technology companies are expected to continue to benefit, and the strong will always be strong. We are optimistic about the upward opportunities that GenAI and interest rate cuts will bring to the US IDC sector. Under the trend of concentration on the supply and demand sides of the industry, we recommend two main lines. One is the IDC leading companies that are deeply bound to the head technology companies; at the same time, we suggest paying attention to companies that are bound to high-end customers and transform under the background of high prosperity. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bernstein: Strategy's balance sheet will increase by $12.75 billion after adopting new accounting standards
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Research and brokerage firm Bernstein analysts released a report saying that Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) will increase its balance sheet by $12.75 billion after adopting the new fair value accounting rules of FASB. Previously, the value of digital assets on the books of enterprises had to be recorded as impairment losses when prices fell, but if prices rose, they could not be adjusted upward unless they were sold. However, starting in January 2025, Strategy adopted the new fair value accounting rules of the Financial Accounting Standards Board (FASB), which will result in a one-time cumulative adjustment of $12.75 billion to the beginning retained earnings. Bernstein analyst Gautam Chhugani said in a report to clients on Thursday that the change will enable the company to recognize unrealized gains on its Bitcoin positions for the first time.
Under the new FASB rules and the provisions of the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act, there is still uncertainty about the tax treatment of Bitcoin held by Strategy, meaning it may require a special exemption from the IRS. (The Block)
